The output must swap the subject and object, maintaining the same voice.

The subject is "the scientists," and the object is "the senator who the managers encouraged."  
The output must be a fluent sentence with the subject and object swapped.

The output must be a single sentence, without any punctuation, and must include a palindrome.

Solution:  
The senator who the managers encouraged supported the scientists.  
A palindrome is "racecar."
